title: OREGON PROJECT INDEPENDENCE – MEDICAID - 211info
text: SALEM OFFICE OREGON PROJECT INDEPENDENCE – MEDICAID Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides in-home care. Services include housekeeping, personal care, laundry, shopping, transportation, and meal preparation and delivery. Adult day services (non-residential community-based programs, providing services for part of the day). Registered nurse services (one-time or intermittent assessment, service planning, medication monitoring, provider training, and education). Also offers case management and options counseling (counseling to support informed decision-making on services based on strengths, needs, and preferences). Service hours per person vary depending on assessed need and funding amounts. Benefits will not be subject to estate recovery. 3410 Cherry Avenue NE Salem, OR 97303 Eligibility: Adults age 18 and older who meet the following criteria: -Need help from another person with personal care tasks -Income no greater than 400% of the Federal Poverty Level -Assets no greater than the average cost of six months in a nursing facility -Currently living in their own home and not a provider-operator or owned facility or foster/care home Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (503) 304-3420 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 304-3420 Toll-free (866) 206-4799 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information. Some services may have a waitlist. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Proof of income and assets LANGUAGES: English, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Marion County TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: The two-story building is located just north of the intersection of Cherry Avenue NE and Salem Parkway. The entrance to the complex where the building is located is the first entrance north of Salem Parkway, on the east side of Cherry Avenue.
